name: @md-oss/design-system
description: Reusable React UI components, hooks, and styles

scripts.build: pnpm exec md-oss-sync-package-exports && pnpm exec md-oss-apply-package-publish-config && NODE_OPTIONS="--max-old-space-size=8192" pkgroll --minify --clean-dist --sourcemap  --define.process.env.NODE_ENV='"production"' --define.DEBUG=false && pnpm exec md-oss-add-module-directives --from-package-exports --extensions=mjs,cjs
